common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

siteFooter.description: Mail-in repair for phones, tablets, and laptops with free estimates, human-reviewed quotes, tracked repair progress, and secure return shipping.

home.metaTitle: Repair Center — Premium Mail-In Phone, Tablet & Laptop Repair
home.metaDescription: Mail-in repair for phones, tablets, and laptops with free photo estimates, human review, tracked progress, and secure return shipping.
home.heroTitle: Mail-in device repair you can trust.
home.heroDescription: Repair for phones, tablets, and laptops with a simple estimate process, clear approval steps, and tracked return shipping.
home.devicesIntro: Send in your device — phones, laptops, and tablets — and we will diagnose, repair, and ship it back to you.
home.commonRepairsIntro: Most repairs fall into a handful of categories. Get a price estimate in minutes.
home.deviceCardPhonesText: Screen repairs, batteries, charging ports, cameras, and common hardware issues.
home.deviceCardLaptopsText: Battery service, keyboards, storage upgrades, software recovery, and select hardware repairs.
home.deviceCardTabletsText: Glass and screen repairs, batteries, charging ports, and other common tablet repairs.
home.deviceCardDesktopsText: Handled case by case when the repair and shipping make sense for a mail-in service.
home.repairScreenText: Cracked glass, dead pixels, or touch issues repaired with quality replacement parts.
home.repairBatteryText: Weak, swollen, or fast-draining batteries replaced to restore reliable daily use.
home.repairChargingText: Loose, damaged, or inconsistent charging ports repaired so your device powers properly again.
home.repairKeyboardText: Stuck, damaged, or unresponsive laptop keys repaired with compatible replacement parts.
home.repairSsdText: Upgrade storage for faster performance, more space, and smoother everyday use.
home.repairSoftwareText: Help for devices that will not boot, run poorly, or need a clean operating system reinstall.
home.trustSafeText: Every shipment is tracked and insured so you always know where your device is.
home.trustQualityText: We use vetted replacement parts and provide a warranty on every repair we complete.
home.trustSupportText: Real people review every estimate and answer questions throughout the repair.
home.whatWeRepairTitle: Phones, tablets, laptops, and select desktops
home.readyHeading: Get your repair price in seconds.
home.readyBody: Use our instant estimator to see pricing right away, or submit a full estimate with photos.

howItWorks.title: How mail-in repair works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple, transparent process from estimate to return shipping.
howItWorks.step1Text: Tell us about your device and the issue. Add photos if you can — we use them to spot extra damage before you ship.
howItWorks.step2Text: A technician reviews your request and sends a firm price. Approve when you are ready and we email shipping instructions.
howItWorks.step3Text: Pack the device using our checklist and ship it to our facility. Tracking is included.
howItWorks.step4Text: We diagnose, repair, and ship the device back. You can track every step from your phone.
howItWorks.heroTitle: A simple mail-in repair process from estimate to return delivery
howItWorks.heroDescription: The process is designed to stay clear and easy to follow from the moment you request an estimate to the day your device is shipped back.
howItWorks.process1Text: Upload photos, choose your device, and describe the issue before mailing anything in.
howItWorks.process2Text: We review the request and send the next step based on the repair details you provided.
howItWorks.process3Text: You only move forward when you are ready to continue with the repair process.
howItWorks.process4Text: Once your device arrives, it is checked in and inspected before the repair moves forward.
howItWorks.process5Text: Your device is repaired, tested, and prepared for return once the work is complete.
howItWorks.process6Text: Your repaired device is shipped back with tracking so you can follow the final step too.
howItWorks.expectHeading: Clear steps before, during, and after the repair
howItWorks.expectBody: You start with an estimate, approve the next step before shipping, follow progress while the repair is underway, and receive tracking when the device is on the way back.
howItWorks.readyBody: That is the first step before anything is mailed in.
howItWorks.heroAlt: Phones, tablets, and laptops arranged on a desk

estimateForm.step1Subtitle: Select the device you need repaired to get started.
estimateForm.step2Subtitle: Select your device brand and the exact model.
estimateForm.step3SubtitleGeneric: Your device — select the repair type.
estimateForm.step3NoRepairs: No repairs listed for this model — you can still submit and describe the issue.
estimateForm.step4Subtitle: Clear photos help us give a more accurate estimate. Up to 6 images.
estimateForm.step4NotesPlaceholder: What happened? What is not working? Any other details we should know.
estimateForm.step5Title: Where should we send the estimate?
estimateForm.step5SubtitleSignedIn: Signed in as {email}. We'll email your estimate within one business day.
estimateForm.step5SubtitleAnon: No account required. We'll email you the estimate within one business day.
estimateForm.successText: We'll review your request and email you a detailed estimate, usually within one business day.
estimateForm.successStep1: We review your photos and device details
estimateForm.successStep2: We send you a detailed estimate by email
estimateForm.successStep3: You approve and mail your device to us

errors.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number with at least 10 digits.

tracking.title: Track your repair
tracking.subtitle: Enter the tracking ID we emailed you, plus the email used when submitting.
tracking.notFound: We couldn't find a repair with that ID and email.
tracking.estimateReadyText: Review the price and turnaround on the estimate page.
tracking.mailInText: Print your shipping instructions and pack your device.
tracking.messagePlaceholder: Write a message to the repair team…
tracking.prompt: Enter the email you used when submitting your request. You can use your Quote ID (RCQ-…) or Order Number (RCO-…).
tracking.actionRequiredText: A revised estimate needs your approval before the repair can continue.
tracking.depositRequiredText: An inspection deposit is required before we can begin.
tracking.finalPaymentText: Repair is complete. Pay the remaining balance so we can ship your device back.
tracking.replyPlaceholder: Ask a question or send a note about your repair.
tracking.descSubmitted: Your request has been received. We'll review it shortly.
tracking.descUnderReview: Our team is reviewing your device details and photos.
tracking.descEstimateSent: We've sent you an estimate by email. Please review it to proceed.
tracking.descInspection: Your device has arrived and we're assessing it.
tracking.descRepairing: Repair is in progress. We'll keep you updated.
tracking.descAwaitingParts: Waiting on parts to arrive before we continue.
tracking.descAwaitingBalancePayment: Repair is complete! Please pay the remaining balance to ship.
tracking.descReadyToShip: Your device is repaired and ready to be shipped back to you.
tracking.descShipped: Your device is on its way back to you.
tracking.descDelivered: Your device has been delivered. Enjoy!
tracking.descReturnedUnrepaired: Your device was returned without repair.
tracking.descBeyondEconomicalRepair: Unfortunately the repair cost would exceed the device value.
tracking.descNoFaultFound: Our inspection found no fault with the device.

estimateReview.title: Your repair estimate
estimateReview.subtitle: Review the details below. Approve to start the repair or decline to receive your device back.
estimateReview.verifyEmail: Confirm your email to view this estimate.
estimateReview.manualPaymentSubtitle: Use one of the options below to send your deposit. Once we confirm payment, we'll start the repair.
estimateReview.approvedText: Thanks for approving! Check your email for next steps.
estimateReview.declinedText: We understand. Your device will be returned to you.
estimateReview.reviewTitleAlt: Review the repair estimate before anything moves forward
estimateReview.reviewIntro: Enter the same email used for the estimate request to securely view pricing, included line items, turnaround notes, and the current decision status.
estimateReview.step1Text: Review the estimate and included line items.
estimateReview.step2Text: Approve only if you want the repair flow to continue.
estimateReview.step3TextRevised: If this is revised or final, the repair continues only after your approval.
estimateReview.step3TextPreliminary: After approval, follow the next-step page shown by the system.
estimateReview.finalEstimateText: Inspection and diagnosis are complete. This final estimate reflects the full cost of the repair. Approving it authorizes the shop to proceed.
estimateReview.revisedEstimateText: New findings during inspection changed the repair scope. Please review the updated line items and cost before deciding whether to continue.
estimateReview.approveTextPreliminary: Approving this estimate moves the repair to the next stage. Declining will close this estimate path.
estimateReview.approveTextRevised: Approving this revised estimate authorizes the repair to continue. Declining will close this estimate path.
estimateReview.contactShopForPayment: Please contact the shop for payment details.
estimateReview.estimateApprovedTrackingMsg: Estimate approved. Repair can now continue and your tracking page has been updated.
estimateReview.estimateApprovedWithOrderMsg: Estimate approved. Repair order {orderNumber} has been created and the request is now ready for mail-in instructions.
estimateReview.estimateApprovedMsg: Estimate approved. The request is now ready for mail-in instructions.
estimateReview.estimateDeclinedMsg: Estimate declined. The quote has been updated.

mailIn.title: Mail-in instructions
mailIn.subtitle: Follow the steps below to send us your device safely.
mailIn.verifyEmail: Confirm your email to view instructions.
mailIn.checklist1: Back up any data you can't afford to lose.
mailIn.checklist2: Sign out of Find My / device-tracking accounts.
mailIn.checklist3: Remove SIM cards, memory cards, and cases.
mailIn.checklist4: Pack the device in a padded box with bubble wrap.
mailIn.checklist5: Include a note with your tracking ID inside.
mailIn.depositText: Your inspection deposit of {amount} is due before we begin the repair.
mailIn.depositManual: Send your deposit using the payment options shown below.
mailIn.mailInIntro: Once your estimate is approved, use this page to confirm your order, review packaging guidance, and ship the device safely.
mailIn.beforeYouShipText: After the device arrives, it will be checked into intake, inspected, and moved through the tracked repair workflow in your order record.
mailIn.contactShopText: Please contact the shop to arrange payment.
mailIn.payBeforeShipping: Please pay the inspection deposit before mailing your device.

shopLanding.subtitleSimple: Fast, friendly repair service for phones, laptops, and tablets.
shopLanding.ctaEstimateDescription: Tell us about your device and we'll send a price within 1 business day.
shopLanding.ctaTrackDescription: Already have a tracking ID? Check progress here.
shopLanding.ctaBookDescription: Prefer to bring it in? Reserve a time that works for you.
shopLanding.ctaAccountDescription: See all your repairs and appointments in one place.
shopLanding.step1Text: Mail it in or drop it off — we'll diagnose and quote within 1 business day.
shopLanding.step2Text: We send a firm price by email. You approve before any work begins.
shopLanding.step3Text: Skilled technicians use quality parts and document every step.
shopLanding.step4Text: We ship it back (or call you for pickup) when it's fully tested and ready.
shopLanding.defaultSubheadline: Get a free estimate in under 60 seconds.

adminBilling.subtitle: Manage your subscription and payment acceptance.
adminBilling.pastDueWarning: Your last payment failed. Update payment to keep your account active.
adminBilling.acceptPaymentsSubtitle: Connect Stripe to accept card payments from your customers.
adminBilling.connectNotConnected: Not connected. Connect your Stripe account to accept payments from customers.
adminBilling.connectIncomplete: Setup incomplete. Finish onboarding to start accepting payments.

adminBilling.faqA1: All features: unlimited quotes, orders, customers, integrated payments, analytics, and team accounts.
adminBilling.faqA2: Yes. Cancel from this page and you'll keep access through the end of the billing period.

adminBilling.pastDuePleaseUpdate: Your last payment failed. Please update your payment method to keep access.

adminBilling.trialEndedHint: Your trial has ended. Upgrade to continue using the platform.
adminBilling.acceptCardSubtitle: Connect your own Stripe account to accept card payments directly. RepairCenter earns a 0.75% platform fee on each transaction.

adminBilling.platformFeeFooter: RepairCenter earns 0.75% on payments processed through your connected account.
adminBilling.aboutPlan1: Your 14-day free trial includes full access to every feature in the product today.
adminBilling.aboutPlan2: No credit card is required during the trial. Your account will not be charged unless you add a payment method.
adminBilling.aboutPlan3: After the trial, a paid subscription is required to continue. Founder Beta is $29/month.
adminBilling.aboutPlan4: Cancel any time from the Manage Subscription portal — no contract, no lock-in. Cancellation takes effect at the end of the current billing period.

adminSuspended.bodyHelper: Contact support to restore access, or sign in with a different account.

adminRepairOrder.noFaultTitle: No fault found — ship device back
adminRepairOrder.beyondRepairBody: The repair cost exceeds the value of the device. Record the return shipment details below and notify the customer.
adminRepairOrder.noFaultBody: No defect was found. Record the return shipment details below and notify the customer.
adminRepairOrder.unrepairedBody: The customer declined the revised estimate. Record the return shipment details below.
adminRepairOrder.finalApprovalTitle: Use when intake changes the quote
adminRepairOrder.finalApprovalBody: If inspection reveals extra damage, hidden defects, or additional labor, send a revised estimate and move the repair into final customer approval.
